hero.title: New Build Construction
hero.subtitle: Exceptional homes, built from the ground up by one accountable team.
hero.description: From groundworks and structural build to first and second fix, finishes and handover, BSL Construction manages every stage of your new build under a single experienced team — so nothing falls between trades and nothing gets lost in translation.

image.alt: Modern new build home constructed by BSL Construction

sections.title: Built Around Your Vision
sections.content: Every new build starts with a clear brief: your goals, your plot, and how the finished home needs to work day to day. We turn that brief into a buildable programme and hold the whole project — design coordination, building control, trades and materials — under one roof, so decisions get made once and stick.

sections.title: One Team, Start to Finish
sections.content: Groundworks, structural shell, roofing, first fix M&E, insulation and airtightness, plastering, and final finishes — we sequence and supervise every stage ourselves. You get one point of contact who knows the build inside out, not a rotating cast of subcontractors reporting to no one.

whatsIncluded.title: What's Included
whatsIncluded.intro: Every new build project is scoped to your specification, but as standard our management includes:
items: Structural build, roofing and building envelope
Coordination of all first and second fix trades
Snagging, final clean and handover pack

process.title: Our New Build Process
process.description: A clear, structured approach designed to keep your project moving from first conversation to completion.

steps.title: Consultation & Planning
steps.content: We review the drawings, understand your requirements and agree the scope, programme and budget before anything starts on site.

steps.title: Construction
steps.content: Our team runs the build day to day, coordinating every trade through groundworks, structure and finishes.

steps.title: Final Handover
steps.content: We complete finishing details, carry out a full snag check, and hand over a property that's genuinely ready to live in.

faqs.question: How long does a new build take?
faqs.answer: Timelines depend on the size, specification and complexity of the project. We provide a realistic programme before construction begins, and update it as the build progresses.

faqs.question: Do you manage the whole project, or just the build?
faqs.answer: We manage the full construction process — coordinating trades, materials and building control — so you have one accountable team throughout, not a list of separate contractors to chase.

faqs.question: Can you work alongside our architect?
faqs.answer: Yes. We regularly work from third-party drawings and coordinate directly with your architect or designer to keep the build on spec.

areasCovered.title: Areas We Cover
areasCovered.description: We deliver new build projects across most of London and the surrounding home counties, from period-heavy inner boroughs to outer London plots.

cta.title: Ready to Build Your New Home?
cta.content: Tell us about your plot and plans, and our team will talk you through scope, budget and next steps — no obligation.

seo.metaTitle: New Build Construction London | BSL Construction
seo.metaDescription: BSL Construction delivers high-quality new build construction across London, managing every stage from planning to final handover.

hero.title: House Extensions
hero.subtitle: More space, built properly, without the guesswork.
hero.description: We design-manage and build extensions that add genuine value and connect seamlessly with your existing home — from single-storey rear extensions to full wrap-arounds — with one team responsible for the whole job.

image.alt: Modern house extension construction project in London

sections.title: More Space, Better Living
sections.content: Whether you need a bigger kitchen-diner, a second bathroom or a dedicated home office, we build extensions around how you actually use your home — not a generic template. Every layout is checked against light, flow and your existing floorplan before we break ground.

sections.title: Managed From Groundworks to Finish
sections.content: Foundations, structural steel, brick and blockwork, roofing, glazing, and internal finishes — we coordinate every trade so the extension ties into your existing structure cleanly, inside and out, with no loose ends left for you to manage.

whatsIncluded.title: What's Included
whatsIncluded.intro: As standard, our extension projects include:
items: First and second fix electrics and plumbing

process.title: Our Extension Process
process.description: A straightforward approach to creating additional space, from first survey to final finish.

steps.title: Planning
steps.content: We review your requirements, survey the property and confirm the scope, programme and construction approach.

steps.title: Build
steps.content: Our team manages the construction and coordinates every trade involved, from groundworks through to roof.

steps.title: Handover
steps.content: We complete finishing work, final checks and a proper handover, with any snags closed out before we leave.

faqs.question: Do you handle planning permission and building regulations?
faqs.answer: We can guide you through the process and coordinate with planning consultants where needed, and we manage all building control sign-off directly.

faqs.question: Can I stay in the house during the build?
faqs.answer: In most cases, yes. We sequence work to minimise disruption and agree a clear plan with you before starting.

faqs.question: How is the price agreed?
faqs.answer: We provide a fixed, itemised quote before work starts, so you know exactly what's included and what isn't.

areasCovered.title: Areas We Cover
areasCovered.description: We build extensions across most of London, with particular experience in period properties and tight urban plots.

cta.title: Ready to Create More Space?
cta.content: Let's discuss your extension project — the layout, the budget, and how we'd sequence the build.

seo.metaDescription: Professional house extension construction across London, delivered by BSL Construction from planning through to completion.

hero.title: Plumbing Services
hero.subtitle: Reliable plumbing for homes, renovations and commercial properties.
hero.description: From first-fix pipework on a full renovation to a same-week repair, our plumbing team works to the same standard on every job — clean installs, tested systems, and no call-backs.

sections.title: Installations Done Properly
sections.content: New bathrooms, kitchen pipework, cylinder and system upgrades, or full re-pipes as part of a wider renovation — we install to current regulations and pressure-test everything before it's boxed in or plastered over.

sections.title: Maintenance & Repairs
sections.content: Leaks, low pressure, failing valves, or an ageing system that needs attention before it fails — we diagnose the actual cause, not just the symptom, and fix it once.

whatsIncluded.title: What's Included
items: Coordination with renovation and construction projects

process.title: Our Plumbing Process
process.description: A straightforward approach to identifying and completing plumbing work properly.

steps.title: Assessment
steps.content: We understand the issue or project requirements and assess the work needed.

steps.title: Installation or Repair
steps.content: Our team completes the agreed work using appropriate methods and materials, to current regulations.

steps.title: Final Check
steps.content: We pressure-test and inspect the completed work before signing it off.

faqs.question: Do you provide emergency plumbing repairs?
faqs.answer: We can discuss urgent plumbing issues and the appropriate response depending on the nature of the problem.

faqs.question: Can you handle plumbing as part of a larger renovation?
faqs.answer: Yes — plumbing is coordinated directly with our construction and renovation projects, so pipework, finishes and programme all line up.

faqs.question: Are your engineers qualified and insured?
faqs.answer: Yes, all plumbing work is carried out by qualified engineers and covered under our insurance.

areasCovered.title: Areas We Cover
areasCovered.description: Our plumbing team covers most of London, from single repairs to full system installs on larger projects.

cta.title: Need Plumbing Support?
cta.content: Contact BSL Construction to discuss your plumbing requirements, big or small.

seo.metaDescription: Professional plumbing services for residential and commercial properties across London.

hero.title: Electrical Services
hero.subtitle: Safe, certified electrical work for modern properties.
hero.description: Full rewires, consumer unit upgrades, renovation first and second fix, or a single fault that needs sorting — our electricians work to current wiring regulations and certify every job.

sections.title: Electrical Installation
sections.content: New builds, extensions, refurbishments and rewires — we plan the electrical design around how each room is actually used, then install and test to full compliance with current wiring regulations.

sections.title: Improvements & Maintenance
sections.content: Consumer unit upgrades, additional circuits, fault-finding, or an EICR ahead of a sale or let — we handle the paperwork as thoroughly as the work itself, so you have a proper record of what's been done.

whatsIncluded.title: What's Included
items: First and second fix on renovations and new builds
Coordination with construction and refurbishment projects

process.title: Our Electrical Process
process.description: A clear approach to understanding and completing electrical work safely.

steps.title: Assessment
steps.content: We understand the property's electrical requirements and agree the scope of work.

steps.title: Installation or Repair
steps.content: Our qualified electricians carry out the agreed work to current regulations.

steps.title: Testing & Certification
steps.content: We test everything, issue the relevant certification, and walk you through what's been done.

faqs.question: Do you provide electrical certification?
faqs.answer: Yes, all electrical work is tested and certified in line with current regulations, and we provide copies for your records.

faqs.question: Can you carry out a full rewire while the property is occupied?
faqs.answer: In many cases yes, though this depends on the scope. We'll agree a practical plan with you before starting.

faqs.question: Do you handle commercial electrical work?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can discuss electrical requirements for suitable commercial and managed properties.

areasCovered.title: Areas We Cover
areasCovered.description: We carry out electrical work across most of London, on projects ranging from single-room upgrades to full rewires.

cta.title: Need Electrical Support?
cta.content: Contact our team to discuss your electrical requirements and get a clear, certified quote.

seo.metaDescription: Professional, certified electrical services for residential and commercial properties across London.

hero.title: Commercial Maintenance
hero.subtitle: Reliable maintenance for commercial properties and managed buildings.
hero.description: One team covering fabric, M&E and general building maintenance — scheduled around your business hours, with a single point of contact instead of a list of separate contractors to chase.

sections.title: Maintenance Built Around Your Business
sections.content: Commercial properties need maintenance that works around trading hours, tenants and footfall — not the other way round. We schedule works to minimise disruption and keep your building compliant and presentable year-round.

sections.title: One Reliable Point of Contact
sections.content: Building fabric, M&E, general repairs and small works — we coordinate every trade under a single contract, so property owners and managers get one invoice and one number to call, not a spreadsheet of contractors.

whatsIncluded.title: What's Included
items: Out-of-hours scheduling to suit trading businesses
Single point of contact and reporting

process.title: Our Commercial Maintenance Process
process.description: A structured approach to managing commercial property maintenance requirements.

steps.title: Assessment
steps.content: We understand your property's maintenance requirements and agree the scope of work.

steps.title: Maintenance
steps.content: Our team coordinates and completes the agreed maintenance work, scheduled around your business.

steps.title: Completion & Reporting
steps.content: We complete the work, confirm sign-off, and report back clearly on what's been done.

faqs.question: Do you provide ongoing maintenance contracts?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can discuss a scheduled maintenance contract tailored to your property and business hours.

faqs.question: Can you coordinate multiple trades under one contract?
faqs.answer: Yes, that's the core of the service — one contract, one point of contact, covering the trades your property needs.

faqs.question: Do you cover multi-site portfolios?
faqs.answer: We can discuss requirements for suitable multi-site and managed property portfolios.

areasCovered.title: Areas We Cover
areasCovered.description: We support commercial and managed properties across most of London, including multi-site portfolios.

cta.title: Need Commercial Maintenance?
cta.content: Tell us about your property and discuss your maintenance requirements with our team.

seo.metaDescription: Reliable commercial property maintenance services across London for businesses and managed buildings.

hero.title: Facilities Support
hero.subtitle: Ongoing property support for managed buildings and commercial spaces.
hero.description: A flexible facilities service that scales with your building — from routine upkeep to coordinated repairs and improvement works — so property managers and businesses have one team on call.

image.alt: Facilities support for commercial properties in London

sections.title: Supporting Your Building
sections.content: Maintenance, repairs and improvement works across suitable commercial and managed buildings — handled by a team that already knows your property, rather than a different contractor for every job.

sections.title: Coordinated Property Support
sections.content: We coordinate the relevant trades and maintenance requirements on your behalf, giving property managers and businesses a straightforward, responsive point of contact for whatever the building needs next.

whatsIncluded.title: What's Included
items: Coordinated trade repairs and small works
Single point of contact for property managers
Flexible scope, scaled to your building

process.title: Our Facilities Support Process
process.description: A flexible approach to supporting your property's ongoing requirements.

steps.title: Understand
steps.content: We understand your property, facilities and ongoing maintenance requirements.

steps.title: Coordinate
steps.content: We coordinate the relevant maintenance, repair and property works.

steps.title: Support
steps.content: We provide ongoing support based on the agreed requirements and scope.

faqs.question: What does facilities support include?
faqs.answer: It can include maintenance, repairs and other building-related requirements — the scope is agreed around what your property actually needs.

faqs.question: Can you provide ongoing support?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can discuss ongoing facilities and property support for suitable commercial buildings.

faqs.question: Do you respond to ad-hoc requests as well as scheduled work?
faqs.answer: Yes — we handle both scheduled upkeep and one-off requests as they come up.

areasCovered.title: Areas We Cover
areasCovered.description: We provide facilities support across most of London for commercial and managed properties.

cta.title: Need Reliable Facilities Support?
cta.content: Tell us about your property and discuss your ongoing facilities requirements with our team.

seo.metaDescription: Reliable facilities and property support services for commercial buildings and managed properties across London.
